nasb.text: and when it was filled, they drew it up on the beach; and they sat down and gathered the good fish into containers, but the bad they threw away.

esv.text: When it was full, men drew it ashore and sat down and sorted the good into containers but threw away the bad.

cnv.text: 網滿了之後，人就把網拉上岸，坐下來把好的揀出，收藏起來，不好的就丟在外面。

ccb.text: 网满了，人们把网拉上岸，然后坐下来挑选，好的就收起来，不好的就丢掉。

csbs.text: 网一满了，渔夫们就把它拉上岸来，然后坐下，把好的收进筐里，把坏的丢在外面。
